title: Youri Matiounine
text: Home * People * Youri Matiounine Youri Matiounine , an American actuary at New York Life Insurance Company [1] . As computer games programmer, Youri Matiounine is author of the Othello bot Ymatioun [2] , open source under the GNU GPL v3 [3] , written in C++ using AVX2 intrinsics and some x86-64 assembly with AVX2 instructions, and the Chess Engine Communication Protocol and later UCI compliant chess engine Fizbo , introduced in May 2014 to CCRL [4] , which became open source in October 2019 [5] [6] .
